description: Lecture on multi-parameter mechanism design and the VCG mechanism, discussing revenue maximization in keyword auctions and the application of theory by researchers Michael Ostrovsky and Michael Schwartz at Yahoo.
topic_summary: The lecture covers the application of mechanism design theory to keyword auctions, focusing on reserve prices and their impact on revenue maximization. It highlights a case study by Ostrovsky and Schwartz, who analyzed Yahoo's auction practices and proposed adjustments based on theoretical models [t=0:56].
